intro: Neoregelia makoyana, commonly known as the 'Freeman' Bromeliad, is a tropical plant species native to the Americas, belonging to the family Bromeliaceae. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits.
